name: whey protein isolate
description: A concentrated dairy-derived protein ingredient used to boost the protein content and improve the nutritional profile of food products.
raw_text: Pure whey 100% isolate vanille: Isolatos de proteínas de lactoserum de lactoserum (leche) (emulsionantes: lecitinas de soja y girasol) (96 %), aroma natural, edulcorante: glucósidos de esteviol producidos por vía enzimática. Puede contener trazas de: gluten, huevo, sulfitos, pescado, apio, frutos secos, mostaza. Los aislados de proteínas de lactosuero provienen de la Unión Europea. Hecho en Francia. | B protein: Proprietary blend of high quality protein (Whey protein concentrate, Soy protein isolate), Skdmmed milk powder, Sucrose, Maltodextrin, Malt extract, Natural cocoa powder, Inulin (Detary fibre), Oleic sunflower oil powder, Minerals, Vitamins Allergen Information: Contains Milk, Soy ingredients Calorific Distrihution Protein | Pure Whey Isolate: Whey Protein Isolate (Milk), Flavouring, Thickener (Xanthan Gum), Soya Lecithin, Sweetener (Sucralose)
